query: I have a PRD for a new multi-tenant billing system (it's at docs/prds/billing-v2.md). Can you analyze it and create an implementation plan with epics, stories, and tasks? I need estimates and dependency ordering.

we just got the product brief for the notifications overhaul from the PM. its in google docs but I copied it to docs/notifications-brief.md. need to turn it into something actionable - tasks, priorities, the whole breakdown

I want to plan out the implementation for our new search feature. We need elasticsearch integration, a search API, and frontend components. Can you break this down into manageable tasks with the right ordering?
take this feature spec and create a PROJECT.md with the full epic/story/task hierarchy. I want to see what skills each feature needs and get the kanban board set up in ohno

hey I've got this concept doc from the founder about adding a marketplace to our platform. It's pretty high-level and vague in places. Can you analyze it, flag the ambiguities, and create a structured plan?
need to break down the payments integration project. we're adding Stripe for subscriptions, metered billing, and invoicing. probably 3-4 epics worth of work. create the task hierarchy with estimates

we have an existing plan in ohno but the scope changed significantly after the stakeholder meeting. the original PRD is at docs/prds/dashboard-v3.md and the new requirements are in docs/prds/dashboard-v3-revised.md. need to re-plan
I want to do a headless planning session on the API migration PRD. auto-decide on ambiguities, skip the review, just generate the full plan and task breakdown into ohno
can you review the plan we created last week for the auth refactor? walk me through the decisions that were made and let me adjust priorities and dependencies

I've got a rough feature list for our MVP - user registration, profile management, team invites, and role-based permissions. Can you turn this into a proper implementation plan with the right build order?
I've got the tasks already planned in ohno and I want to start working through them in semi-auto mode. The project is a Next.js app. Let's get started.
there's a bug where the checkout page crashes when a user has more than 50 items in their cart. the error is a TypeError in CartSummary.tsx line 142
I need to investigate whether we should use PostgreSQL row-level security or application-level tenant isolation. Give me about 2 hours to prototype both and compare
design the REST API endpoints for our inventory management service. I need CRUD operations for products, categories, and suppliers with pagination
our test coverage is at 30% and we have no integration tests. help me design a testing strategy that covers the critical payment flows
review the architecture of our monolith - I think we need to extract the billing module into a separate service. map the dependencies and suggest a migration path
we already have tasks in ohno and I need to revise the plan. story-3 turned out to be way bigger than estimated and we need to split it. also story-5 depends on story-3 now
help me design the database schema for the multi-tenant billing system. each tenant needs isolated billing data and we need to support metered usage tracking
set up GitHub Actions CI/CD for this project. we need build, test, and deploy stages with staging and production environments
check this authentication implementation for security vulnerabilities. I'm worried about the JWT token handling and the password reset flow
